c4c8b45d4216956d087c3276823cb7c44a394764: feat(batch): Airlock Batch Gateway + AI Studio adapter (Pack 0.4.0-C)

blockers_encountered.description: MAIN working dir (/home/coreyt/projects/airlock) shows 'M .claude/agents/implementer.md' and '?? dev/update-docs.md'. The stray-edit tripwire flagged these.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Not mine — every Edit/Write/Bash I ran targeted absolute paths under /tmp/airlock-0.4.0-C only. These are pre-existing orchestrator scaffolding, not my stray edits, so I left MAIN untouched as required (did NOT revert orchestrator files).

blockers_encountered.description: tests/test_fathom_init.py::test_init_engine_with_fathomdb fails in my env because the optional 'fathomdb' (db extra) is not installed (I synced only --extra test).
blockers_encountered.resolution: Pre-existing environment/dependency condition unrelated to this pack — not a regression from my changes. All other suite tests pass (1687 passed).

additional_changes_made_in_scope: §3.7 interpretation: folded the doc's CLAIMED state into CREATING at claim time (the winner sets CREATING + a 60s lease atomically in one INSERT..ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING). Reconcile-before-create runs for both the fresh winner and an expired-lease reclaimer, so a crashed-winner orphan is adopted (earliest) and any extras with the same display_name are auto-cancelled (bounded to <=1 duplicate).

§3.7 interpretation: begin_retrieving is a CAS that transitions CREATED->RETRIEVING (proceed), allows re-entry while RETRIEVING (resume — the per-row staged-keys diff bounds reprocessing to missing rows), and returns False when already STAGED (second caller re-fetches nothing).

§3.5 status mapping: implemented the Gemini JOB_STATE_* -> OpenAI batch status table explicitly (the doc TOC names §3.5 but the body leaves the exact table to implementation); unknown/in-flight states default to in_progress.

Added airlock/batch/runtime.py (config cache, on-disk streamed file store, backend registry) to keep the gateway core free of disk/config IO and fully unit-testable; it is used only by the live HTTP dispatch path.
uv.lock updated as the consequence of adding the aistudio optional extra to pyproject.toml.
agent_verify_result: pass (tests/test_batch_gateway.py: 28 passed; ruff check + format clean on scoped files; -k 'batch or gateway or aistudio' 57 passed / 2 skipped; full suite 1687 passed, 1 pre-existing fathomdb-extra env failure)
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.4.0-C on branch 0.4.0-C at c4c8b45d4216956d087c3276823cb7c44a394764; review, verify, merge. Deferred seams (firm): Mistral adapter, async think-slow content-scanning (scan_at_upload is a declared NO-OP stub), webhooks, PII hydration, LiteLLMNativeBackend. Live e2e against AI Studio is a separate operator gate (needs GOOGLE_AISTUDIO_API_KEY + the aistudio extra).
